arts.ttl: Serie A | Milan 1-1 Cagliari: Match Report
arts.sum: AC Milan's bright start under new manager Sergio Conceicao hit a snag as they were held to a 1-1 draw by Cagliari at the San Siro. The result comes as a disappointment for the Rossoneri, who were looking to build on their recent Supercoppa Italiana triumph. arts.ttl: Milan in Talks for Salzburg Midfielder Lucas Gourna-Douath
arts.sum: AC Milan have entered negotiations for Lucas Gourna-Douath, the young French midfielder currently playing for Red Bull Salzburg. The 21-year-old has caught the eye of the Rossoneri management as they look to strengthen their midfield options in the January transfer window.
